response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive staff-level software engineering experience and strong leadership capabilities. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) frameworks is highly relevant to the GenAI aspect of the role. While he does not explicitly meet the 8+ years of direct AI solution development, his deep technical foundation, cloud experience, data integration expertise, and specific exposure to agentic workflows make him a compelling candidate for further evaluation.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level software engineering and technical leadership experience.
Direct and recent experience (6 months) with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
Strong background in data integration, cloud platforms (AWS), and quality assurance/testing practices.
concerns: Limited direct experience explicitly building and shipping 8+ years of production-grade AI solutions.
Lack of explicit Python experience, which is a key technology for AI/ML development.
No explicit mention of vector databases or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
